### last time {.smaller}

*  execution unit types
   *  specialization for different operations
   *  single v multi-cycle
   *  pipelined
*  issuing instructions with multi-cycle
*  data-flow graphs and estimating performance
*  branch prediction, briefly
   *  backward taken, forward not-taken
   *  using tables of history
*  branch target buffer (caching branch info)
   *  need to predict before decoding real instruction


{{< include /spectre/_talk-inner.qmd >}}
